Products & Services

Banking Built Around Your Life

From everyday spending to long-term wealth, products that fit every stage of your financial journey.

Instant Transfers

Send money to any bank in Nigeria instantly. No queues, no delays. Transfers complete in under 10 seconds.

Learn more
Smart Savings

Set savings goals, earn competitive interest rates, and grow your wealth automatically with our smart savings tools.

Learn more
Quick Loans

Access personal and business loans with competitive rates. Get decisions in minutes, funds in hours.

Learn more
SME Banking

Dedicated tools and accounts designed for Nigerian businesses. Invoicing, payroll, and trade finance in one place.

Learn more
Debit & Prepaid Cards

Contactless, chip-and-PIN, and virtual cards. Spend locally and internationally with ease.

Learn more
Investments

Fixed deposits, treasury bills, and mutual funds. Let your money work harder with M36.

Learn more

Digital Banking

Bank Anywhere, Anytime

Whether you're online or offline, you're always in control of your money.

UnionMobile App
Full banking in your pocket. Transfers, savings, loans, bills — all in one app.
USSD *826#
No internet? Dial *826# on any phone to send money, buy airtime, check balance.
UnionOnline
Powerful web banking with full account management, statements, and business tools.
WhatsApp Banking
Send money, check balances, and get support on WhatsApp — anytime.

We Listened. We Improved.

We Heard You. Here's What Changed.

Real feedback from real customers drove real change. Here's our commitment to you.

BeforeAfter
Transaction Speed

Failed and delayed transfers were our #1 complaint. We rebuilt our transaction processing engine. Most transfers now clear in under 10 seconds.

98.7%
Transaction success rate
BeforeAfter
Customer Support

Long wait times frustrated you. We expanded to 24/7 multi-channel support — WhatsApp, in-app chat, phone, and email. Average response under 5 minutes.

<5 min
Average response time
BeforeAfter
App Stability

The old app crashed and frustrated thousands. The new UnionMobile is rebuilt with enterprise-grade infrastructure and zero-downtime deployments.

99.9%
App uptime guaranteed
BeforeAfter
Account Freezes

Unexpected account limitations without notice were unacceptable. We now send proactive alerts and provide a self-service upgrade path — no branch visit needed.

Self-Service
Tier upgrade in-app
BeforeAfter
Digital Onboarding

Opening an account used to mean visiting a branch. Today, open a fully functional account in under 2 minutes — right from your phone.

2 min
Account opening time
BeforeAfter
Security

We deployed real-time AI-powered fraud detection, biometric authentication, and instant card freeze from the app. Your money is safer than ever.

AI-Powered
Real-time fraud detection
Business Banking

Power Your Business Forward

From sole traders to growing enterprises, Union Bank has the tools, credit, and expertise to help Nigerian businesses thrive.

Business Accounts
Current accounts built for business cash flow management.
SME Loans
Competitive rates, flexible terms, fast approvals.
Trade Finance
Import/export letters of credit, bonds, and guarantees.
Payroll
Pay your team on time, every time, with zero stress.
Payments
POS terminals, payment links, and merchant APIs.
Analytics
Real-time financial insights and cash flow reports.

Mobile App

Your Bank in Your Pocket

UnionMobile — rebuilt from the ground up for speed, simplicity, and security.

Instant transfers to any bank in Nigeria in under 10 seconds
Smart savings goals with automated saving and interest
Bill payments — DSTV, GOTV, electricity, airtime, and more
Cardless ATM withdrawal — withdraw cash without your debit card
Biometric login — fingerprint and face ID for instant secure access
Investment tools — fixed deposits and M36 investment products
